usedForCollider.title: Whether a collider should use this sprite's shape as a reference.

usedForSteeringWheel.title: Whether this sprite should act as a "steering wheel", rotating toward your steering direction
usedForSteeringWheel.description: Only relevant when using the wheeledController

spritePath.title: PNG file name in the mod's folder.

color.title: Change the sprite color.
color.description:
Optional.
Most commonly used for "energySprites", such as a bright cockpit. That are by default white and have their material set to 1. Color is then used to tweak the energy color.

sortingOrder.title: The sprite sorting order. Higher gets rendered above lower.
